meaning: n.指甲花,红褐色,指甲花染料
examples: Henna comes from the leaves of a shrub, Lawsonia inermis.
I recognised them because he and his son had henna on their toes.
Yonder is my house, by the hedge of flowering henna ; I will guide you.
Alamsa looks stunning in her Indian wedding gown and with mehndi - henna designs - on her hands.
Scores of henna artists are hired to make sure that nobody waits too long to get their artwork done.
